caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is positioned in the center of the shot against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green patterned tunic with a dark beaded necklace and a small lapel microphone clipped to her collar. The woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift slightly as she talks, while her posture remains stable. In the lower-left and lower-center areas of the scene, a circular gold and maroon logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". The lighting is consistent throughout, focusing on her face and upper torso. Between the frames, there are no changes in the setting, clothing, or the position of the woman, with the only movement being the natural animation of her face and mouth as she delivers her speech.
